_comment: Style tokens — change these to restyle all help messages at once.
style.label: <color:#FFF200>
style.name: <white>
help.afk.description: Toggle your AFK status. Broadcasts to the server.
help.afk.args: [message...] Optional reason shown to other players.
help.afklist.description: List all AFK players and how long they have been AFK.
help.afklist.args: [sort] Sort order: time, duration, world, name.
help.ah.description: Auction House — browse, sell, and manage listings.
help.ah.subcommands:
sell <price> List held item at this price.
cancel [id] Cancel one of your listings.
listings View your active listings.
expired View your expired listings.
help.ah.args: <price> Positive number.\n[id] Listing ID. Omit to pick from your listings.
help.back.description: Teleport to your last location before a teleport or death.
help.balance.description: Check your balance, or another player's balance.
help.baltop.description: Show a paginated leaderboard of the richest players.
help.ban.description: Ban a player permanently or with an optional duration.
help.ban.args: <player> Player name to ban.\n-t:<duration> e.g. -t:1h, -t:7d. Omit for permanent.\n[reason...] Shown on kick screen and in broadcast.
help.banip.description: Ban an IP. Accepts a player name or raw IP address.
help.banip.args: <player|ip> Player name or raw IPv4/IPv6 address.\n-t:<duration> Optional duration flag.\n[reason...] Ban reason.
help.banlist.description: List active bans, filtered by type.
help.banlist.subcommands: players Show player bans.\nips Show IP bans.\nhistory Show recent history.
help.broadcast.description: Send a message to all players. First arg can be a world name.
help.broadcast.args: [world] Optional world to target.\n<message...> MiniMessage formatting supported.
help.broadcast.examples: /broadcast Server restarts in 5 minutes!\n/broadcast world_nether Nether resets tonight.
help.checkpunish.description: Look up the active ban and mute for a player.
help.checkpunish.args: <player> Player name. Works for offline players.
help.clearinventory.description: Clear your inventory, or another player's.
help.dback.description: Teleport back to where you were before your last death.
help.delhome.description: Delete one of your saved homes by name.
help.delhome.args: <n> Name of the home to delete.
help.delwarp.args: <n> Name of the warp to delete.
help.eco.description: Economy admin: give, take, set, or reset balances.
help.eco.subcommands:
give Add money to a player's balance.
take Remove money from a player's balance.
set Set a player's balance to an exact amount.
reset Reset a player's balance.
help.eco.args: <player|@everyone> Target player or all online players.\n<amount> Positive number.
help.enchant.description: Apply an enchantment to your held item.
help.enchant.args: <enchantment> Key e.g. sharpness, unbreaking, fortune.\n[level] Level. Defaults to the enchantment's max.
help.enderchest.description: Open your ender chest, or another player's.
help.endersee.description: Open and inspect another player's ender chest.
help.essc.description: EssentialsC admin: reload, backup, version, debug, placeholders.
help.essc.subcommands:
reload Reload all configs and language files.
backup Manage data backups.
version Show the running plugin version.
debug Toggle verbose debug logging.
placeholders List all registered PAPI placeholders.
help.feed.description: Restore your hunger bar to full, or feed another player.
help.fly.description: Toggle flight on or off for yourself.
help.god.description: Toggle invincibility for yourself or another player.
help.hat.description: Equip your held item as a cosmetic head slot item.
help.heal.description: Restore your health to full, or heal another player.
help.home.description: Teleport to a saved home, or list your homes.
help.home.args: [name] Home to teleport to. Omit to list homes.\n<player> <n> Another player's home. Requires essentialsc.home.admin.
help.homes.description: List your saved homes with coordinates.
help.ignore.description: Toggle ignore on a player, or list who you ignore.
help.ignore.args: [player] Player to ignore/un-ignore. Omit to list.
help.itemid.description: Show info about your held item: material, durability, enchants, NBT.
help.kick.description: Kick a player from the server.
help.kick.args: <player> Online player to kick.\n[reason...] Shown on the kick screen.
help.kit.description: Claim a kit. Kits have cooldowns and permission nodes.
help.kit.subcommands: claim <n> Claim the named kit.\ncooldown <n> Check time until claimable again.\ndebug <n> Show kit debug info.
help.kit.args: [name] Kit name. Omit to list available kits.
help.kits.description: List all kits and manage the kit system.
help.kits.subcommands: list List all kits.\nreload Reload kits.yml.
help.msg.description: Send a private message to an online player.
help.msg.examples: /msg Steve hey\n/msg Alex meet me at spawn
help.mute.description: Mute a player. Supports optional duration.
help.mute.args: <player> Online player to mute.\n-t:<duration> e.g. -t:30m, -t:1h. Omit for permanent.\n[reason...] Mute reason.
help.nick.description: Set a custom display name. MiniMessage colour codes supported.
help.nick.args: <nickname> New display name.\noff Remove your nickname.\n<player> Target another player. Requires essentialsc.nick.others.
help.pay.description: Transfer money from your balance to another player.
help.pay.args: <player> Online player to pay.\n<amount> Positive amount.
help.ping.description: Check your latency in ms, or another player's.
help.playerlist.description: Show all online players with count and max slots.
help.playtime.description: Show your playtime on the server, or another player's.
help.ptime.description: Set a personal client-side time of day only you can see.
help.ptime.args: <preset> day, noon, night, midnight, dawn, dusk.\n<ticks> 0–24000. Append 'locked' to freeze.\nreset Revert to server time.
help.pweather.description: Set a personal client-side weather only you can see.
help.pweather.args:
sun Force clear weather.
rain Force rain.
storm Force thunder.
reset Revert to server weather.
help.quicksell.description: Sell your held item, or entire inventory, at shop prices.
help.quicksell.args: [inventory] Sell all inventory items. Requires essentialsc.quicksell.inventory.
help.realname.description: Look up the real username behind a player's nickname.
help.realname.args: <nickname> Display name or nickname to resolve.
help.rename.description: Set a custom display name on your held item.
help.rename.args: <name...> New name. MiniMessage supported. Length limits apply.
help.repair.description: Repair your held item, or another player's.
help.reply.description: Reply to the last player who messaged you.
help.rtp.description: Randomly teleport to a safe location in the world.
help.scoreboard.description: Toggle or reload the server scoreboard.
help.scoreboard.subcommands: toggle Toggle the scoreboard on or off.\nreload Reload the scoreboard config.
help.seen.description: Show when a player was last online, first join, and playtime.
help.seen.args: <player> Player name. Works for offline players.
help.sell.description: Open the sell GUI to sell items at shop prices.
help.setspawn.description: Set the server spawn to your current location and facing.
help.sethome.description: Save your current location as a named home.
help.sethome.args: [name] Home name. Defaults to 'home'. Letters, digits, underscores.
help.setwarp.description: Create a server warp at your current location.
help.shop.description: Open the server shop, or jump to a category.
help.shop.args: [category] Category name to open directly.\nreload Reload shop config. Requires essentialsc.shop.admin.
help.spawn.description: Teleport to server spawn. Admins can send another player.
help.spawn.args: [player] Online player to send to spawn. Requires essentialsc.spawn.admin.
help.spawnentity.description: Spawn a mob or entity at your location.
help.spawnentity.args: <entity> Entity type key e.g. zombie, iron_golem.\n[amount] Count. Capped unless essentialsc.spawnentity.bypasslimit.
help.speed.description: Adjust your walk or fly speed, or reset both.
help.speed.subcommands: walkspeed <value> Set walk speed (0.0–1.0).\nflyspeed <value> Set fly speed (0.0–1.0).\nreset Reset both to defaults.
help.sudo.description: Force a player to run a command or send a chat message.
help.sudo.args: <player> Online player to act as.\n<command|message...> Command (with /) or plain chat text.
help.top.description: Teleport to the highest block directly above you.
help.tpa.description: Send a teleport request. They must accept before you move.
help.tpahere.description: Request that another player teleports to you.
help.tpaccept.args: [player] Whose request to accept. Omit for most recent.
help.tpadeny.args: [player] Whose request to deny. Omit for most recent.
help.tpacancel.description: Cancel a teleport request you sent.
help.tpacancel.args: [player] Who you sent to. Omit for most recent.
help.tpaqueue.description: List all your pending incoming and outgoing TPA requests.
help.tpatoggle.description: Toggle whether others can send you TPA requests.
help.tpaignore.description: Block TPA requests from a specific player.
help.tphere.description: Immediately teleport a player to you.
help.tphereall.description: Teleport all online players to your location.
help.tpoffline.description: Teleport to an offline player's last known location.
help.unban.description: Remove an active ban from a player.
help.unenchant.description: Remove an enchantment from your held item, or all of them.
help.unenchant.args: [enchantment] Specific key to remove.\nall Remove every enchantment.
help.unmute.description: Remove an active mute from a player.
help.unmute.args: <player> Name of the muted player. Must be online.
help.uptime.description: Show how long the server has been running.
help.warp.description: Teleport to a server warp. Without a name, lists warps.
help.warp.args: [name] Warp to teleport to. Per-warp costs and cooldowns apply.
help.warp.permission:
essentialsc.warp
bypass warmup: essentialsc.warp.bypass.warmup
bypass cooldown: essentialsc.warp.bypass.cooldown
free: essentialsc.warp.free
help.warps.description: List all server warps you can use.
help.warpadmin.description: Manage server warps: permissions, costs, visibility, and more.
help.warpadmin.subcommands:
setperm <warp> <perm|none> Set or clear the required permission.
setcost <warp> <cost> Set the usage cost.
setdesc <warp> <desc> Set the warp description.
setcategory <warp> <cat> Assign a warp to a category.
hide <warp> Hide from the warp list.
unhide <warp> Make a hidden warp visible.
move <warp> Move to your current location.
info <warp> Show full details.
reload Reload the warp config.
help.worth.description: Show the shop sell value of your held item, or full inventory.
help.worth.args: [inventory] Total value of all inventory items. Requires essentialsc.worth.inventory.
help.anvil.description: Open a virtual anvil GUI from anywhere.
help.craftingtable.description: Open a virtual 3x3 crafting table GUI from anywhere.
